name: @blackbelt-technology/pi-dashboard-document-converter
description_en: TypeScript facade over a Dockerized Python document engine (pi-doc-engine). Bidirectional: ingest any format to provenance-stamped Markdown for kb, produce templated DOCX/PDF with diagrams. Engine quarantined in Docker; TS is the only call surface.
description_zh: Docker 化 Python 文档引擎 (pi-doc-engine) 的 TypeScript 门面。双向：将任何格式摄取为带来源标记的 Markdown 用于知识库，生成带图表的模板化 DOCX/PDF。引擎隔离在 Docker 中；TS 是唯一的调用接口
